title: aleurites montanus
intro: Aleurites montanus, also known as the Mountain Candle Tree, is a plant species native to Southeast Asia, characterized by its bright yellow flowers and edible seeds. The seeds of the Mountain Candle Tree contain oleic acid, which has been used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments. The plant's medicinal properties also include its ability to reduce inflammation and improve cardiovascular health. Aleurites montanus seeds can be prepared as oil, capsules, or tea, and are used to treat conditions such as high cholesterol, diabetes, and arthritis.
